data.title: Dr. Jamie Huysman unveils dark side of talk TV in ABC series "Dirty Talk", exposing industry's "malignant narcissism". $8M secured for exploited guests. New York, Jan 12, 2026.
data.description: A prominent therapist, mental health leader, and expert witness, known for facilitating $8 million in care for exploited individuals on talk, court, and reality shows, sheds light on the industry's issues with "malignant narcissism." Set to air on January 14, the ABC Network will premiere a special program where this expert will discuss their insights.

data.title: Viz.ai ends 2025 with profitability in healthcare, doubles life sciences business, adopted in nearly 2,000 US hospitals.
data.description: In San Francisco, a renowned AI-powered disease detection and intelligent care coordination company, Viz.ai, has reported a successful year with significant achievements. They have experienced remarkable growth, both in their provider network and profitability in the healthcare sector. The launch of their new products, Viz Oncology and Viz Assist, has contributed to this success. Additionally, their life sciences division has seen a substantial increase, doubling in size over the last 18 months. Viz.ai's services are now utilized in close to 2,000 hospitals throughout the US, with a notable presence in the majority of the top 50 health systems in the country.

data.title: Chedraui sets guidance for 2026 in Mexico and U.S., based on scenario akin to 2025 with economic conditions.
data.description: Mexico City, January 12, 2026 - Chedraui, a leading retail company, has unveiled its projections for the fiscal year 2026 in both Mexico and the United States. The company anticipates a financial landscape akin to that experienced in 2025 in Mexico. Chedraui's forecast indicates a comprehensive evaluation of economic conditions in both markets, highlighting a similar trajectory to the previous year.

data.title: Three ETH price charts indicate a potential surge to $4K as recent rally fueled by spot demand and futures market leverage.
data.description: The recent surge in the value of Ethereum (ETH) was primarily influenced by growing demand in the spot market and a strategic utilization of leverage in the futures market. These factors have positioned Ether to potentially make a significant upward move towards the $4,000 mark.

data.title: Macom Tech Solutions stock hits all-time high on Monday due to strong satellite communication prospects.
data.description: Macom Technology Solutions saw its stock reach record levels on Monday as investors showed increased confidence in the company's semiconductor products for satellite communications. The surge in stock price marked an all-time high for Macom, which indicates a positive outlook for its business in this sector. This development underscores growing interest in the company's offerings for satellite technology, reflecting market expectations for continued growth and success.

data.title: DOJ investigating Fed Chair Powell for allegedly lying about central bank headquarters renovations.
data.description: An investigation by the Justice Department is underway to determine if Jerome H. Powell, Federal Reserve’s chair, provided false information regarding the central bank headquarters’ renovations. The inquiry has sparked concerns and garnered attention from various stakeholders.

data.title: Bitcoin steady at $91,570.92, Ethereum at $3,104.15, XRP $2.06, Dogecoin $0.1380.105,562 traders liquidated totalling $283.05M. Spot Bitcoin ETFs outflows $250M, Ethereum ETFs $93.8M.
data.description: The cryptocurrency market began the week with Bitcoin trading at approximately $91,570.92, Ethereum at $3,104.15, Solana at $141.21, XRP at $2.06, Dogecoin at $0.1380, and Shiba Inu at $0.05478. Notable statistics revealed that 105,562 traders were liquidated in the last 24 hours, resulting in losses totaling $283.05 million. Additionally, data from SoSoValue indicated that spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $250 million on Friday, while spot Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $93.8 million. More details on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Drunk Elephant launches new brand direction with "Please Enjoy Responsibly" campaign, focusing on science-backed skincare.
data.description: In New York, Drunk Elephant revealed its updated brand focus on advanced skincare featuring potent ingredients and high levels of actives to provide effective results. The introduction of the "Please Enjoy Responsibly" initiative underscores the brand's commitment to science-backed skincare to help individuals identify the ideal solutions for their skin concerns. This campaign encourages customers to prioritize responsible skincare practices.

data.title: First Merchants Corp declares $46.88 per share dividend for its Preferred Stock Series A (NASDAQ: FRMEP), payable on Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: In Muncie, Indiana, on January 12, 2026, First Merchants Corporation announced a quarterly cash dividend of $46.88 per share for its 7.50% Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A, which is symbolized by depositary shares (NASDAQ: FRMEP), with each depositary share equivalent to a 1/100th stake in a Series A preferred stock share. Holders of depositary shares are entitled to receive $0.4688 per depositary share. The dividend is set to be disbursed on February 16, 2026, to shareholders noted in the records on January 30, 2026.

data.title: Congress is discussing FSOC reform, impacting millions of fund investors. Erica Richardson of ICI discusses the importance.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Erica Richardson, the Chief of Staff & Chief Strategic Communications Officer at the Investment Company Institute (ICI), wrote a Viewpoints blog addressing legislative alterations impacting the designation process of the Financial Stability Oversight Council (FSOC).
